svg.title: DocIntel RAG Architecture
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the DocIntel RAG pipeline: PDF upload, chunking, embedding, Qdrant storage, semantic retrieval, and LLM answer generation.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does DocIntel handle PDF uploads?')
g.text: One or many documents at once

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are embeddings generated in DocIntel?')
sendPrompt('How does Qdrant store vectors in DocIntel?')
sendPrompt('What kind of questions can I ask DocIntel?')
sendPrompt('How is the user query embedded?')
sendPrompt('How does semantic retrieval work in DocIntel?')
sendPrompt('Which LLM does DocIntel use to generate answers?')
sendPrompt('How does DocIntel display the response to users?')
g.text: Grounded answer shown in chat interface
